//: Dev/test config for navikt mock-oauth2-server. interactiveLogin=false makes the authorize endpoint auto-issue a code (no login page), and the tokenCallbacks inject claims for client_id=service-hub so the OIDC integration test can assert config-driven role/admin mapping (eduPersonAffiliation -> student, groups contains dashboard-admins). Use 127.0.0.1 (not localhost): the server crashes on IPv6 peers.
